title: Equal Vision
summary: Viewing all circumstances, people, and events with equal vision (Samatvam). Addresses sibling rivalry, relationship conflicts, jealousy, and envy.

sections.summary: This passage begins with “As it is chanted, the Aum is like space. It has no high or low. The play of light and dark is never obstructed. How can the dot on Aum have any effect?” and develops toward “If I am equal, free of caste and casteless-ness, if I am equal, free of causes and effects, if I am equal, free of division and non-division, why do…”

This passage begins with “Here all minds are one unbroken and undivided. Here all minds are only pure. Here there are no men, everything is mind. Why do you cry O mind? You are the same in everything.” and develops toward “Where there is no knowledge, verses do not go there. I am involved in the world and I am renounced. I have spoken the ultimate truth.”

verses.sanskrit: ॐ इति गदितं गगनसमं तत् न परापरसारविचार इति । अविलासविलासनिराकरणं कथमक्षरबिन्दुसमुच्चरणम् ।। १।।
verses.translation: As it is chanted, the Aum is like space. It has no high or low. The play of light and dark is never obstructed. How can the dot on Aum have any effect?

verses.sanskrit: इति तत्त्वमसिप्रभृतिश्रुतिभिः प्रतिपादितमात्मनि तत्त्वमसि। त्वमुपाधिविवर्जितसर्वसमं किमु रोदिषि मानसि सर्वसमम्।।२।।
verses.translation: ”You are that” - the scriptures say. “You are that” - the Consciousness proves. You are beyond any titles. Why do you cry O mind? You are the same in everything.

verses.sanskrit: अधऊध्र्वविवर्जितसर्वसमं बहिरन्तरवर्जितसर्वसमम्। यदि चैकविवर्जितसर्वसमं किमु रोदिषि मानसि सर्वसमम्।।३।।
verses.translation: Beyond up and down, beyond interior and exterior, if there is only the one and the same Consciousness in all, why are you crying O mind I am the same Consciousness in everything.

verses.sanskrit: न हि कल्पितकल्पविचार इति न हि कारणकार्यविचार इति। पदसन्धिविवर्जितसर्वसमं किमु रोदिषि मानसि सर्वसमम्।।४।।
verses.translation: There is no discrimination between imagined and imagination. There is no discrimination between the cause and effect. There is no discrimination between poem and it's words. Why do you cry O mind? You are the same in everything.

verses.sanskrit: न हि बोधविबोधसमाधिरिति न हि देशविदेशसमाधिरिति। न हि कालविकालसमाधिरिति किमु रोदिषि मानसि सर्वसमम्।।५।।
verses.translation: There is no knowledge and no ignorance in the one. There is no space or lack of space in the one. There is no time and eternity in the one. Why do you cry O mind? You are the same in everything.

verses.sanskrit: न हि कुम्भनभो न हि कुम्भ इति न हि जीववपुर्न हि जीव इति। न हि कारणकार्यविभाग इति किमु रोदिषि मानसि सर्वसमम्।।६।।
verses.translation: There is no space in the pot. There is no soul, there are no beings with soul. There is no causal body or any actions of it. Why do you cry O mind? You are the same in everything.

verses.sanskrit: इह सर्वनिरन्तरमोक्षपदं लघुदीर्घविचारविहीन इति। न हि वर्तुलकोणविभाग इति किमु रोदिषि मानसि सर्वसमम्।।७।।
verses.translation: It is ever free, undifferentiated all. It is not big or small. It is not circular or angular. Why do you cry O mind? You are the same in everything.

verses.sanskrit: इह शून्यविशून्यविहीन इति इह शुद्धविशुद्धविहीन इति। इह सर्वविसर्वविहीन इति किमु रोदिषि मानसि सर्वसमम्।।८।।
verses.translation: It is free of something or nothing. It is free of pure and impure. It is free of everything. Why do you cry O mind? You are the same in everything.

verses.sanskrit: न हि भिन्नविभिन्नविचार इति बहिरन्तरसन्धिविचार इति। अरिमित्रविवर्जितसर्वसमं किमु रोदिषि मानसि सर्वसमम्।।९।।
verses.translation: There is no distinction of difference or non-difference. There is no distinction of interior or exterior. There is no distinction between friend and enemy in it. It is all one equally. Why do you cry O mind? You are the same in everything.

verses.sanskrit: न हि शिष्यविशिष्यस्वरूप इति न चराचरभेदविचार इति। इह सर्वनिरन्तरमोक्षपदं किमु रोदिषि मानसि सर्वसमम्।।१०।।
verses.translation: It is not in the form of student or non-student. It is not differentiated into living or inert. It is everything, eternally free. Why do you cry O mind? You are the same in everything.

verses.sanskrit: ननु रूपविरूपविहीन इति ननु भिन्नविभिन्नविहीन इति। ननु सर्गविसर्गविहीन इति किमु रोदिषि मानसि सर्वसमम्।।११।।
verses.translation: It has no form and formlessness. It has no division or divisionless-ness. It does not have creation or destruction. Why do you cry O mind? You are the same in everything.

verses.sanskrit: न गुणागुणपाशनिबन्ध इति मृतजीवनकर्म करोमि कथम्। इति शुद्धनिरञ्जनसर्वसमं किमु रोदिषि मानसि सर्वसमम्।।१२।।
verses.translation: I am not bound by any qualities or non-qualities. How can I do the actions of life and death. I am pure, spotless, same in everything. Why do you cry O mind? You are the same in everything.

verses.sanskrit: इह भावविभावविहीन इति इह कामविकामविहीन इति। इह बोधतमं खलु मोक्षसमं किमु रोदिषि मानसि सर्वसमम्।।१३।।
verses.translation: Here there is no existence or non-existence. Here there is no desire or desireless-ness. I know that here there is nothing but freedom. Why do you cry O mind? You are the same in everything.

verses.sanskrit: इह तत्त्वनिरन्तरतत्त्वमिति न हि सन्धिविसन्धिविहीन इति। यदि सर्वविवर्जितसर्वसमं किमु रोदिषि मानसि सर्वसमम्।।१४।।
verses.translation: Here is the truth which is undifferentiated. It does not have joints or disjoints. If it is free from everything and same in everything why do you cry O mind? I am the same in everything. Why do you cry O mind? You are the same in everything.

verses.sanskrit: अनिकेतकुटी परिवारसमं इह सङ्गविसङ्गविहीनपरम्। इह बोधविबोधविहीनपरं किमु रोदिषि मानसि सर्वसमम्।।१५।।
verses.translation: I do not dwell in a house, do not have a family. Here there is no association or disassociation, there is no knowledge or ignorance ultimately. Why do you cry O mind? You are the same in everything.

verses.sanskrit: अविकारविकारमसत्यमिति अविलक्षविलक्षमसत्यमिति। यदि केवलमात्मनि सत्यमिति किमु रोदिषि मानसि सर्वसमम्।।१६।।
verses.translation: Changing or unchanging, is not the truth. Purposeful or purposeless, is not the truth. If the only truth is Consciousness, why are you crying O mind? I am in same in everything. Why do you cry O mind? You are the same in everything.

verses.sanskrit: इह सर्वसमं खलु जीव इति इह सर्वनिरन्तरजीव इति। इह केवलनिश्चलजीव इति किमु रोदिषि मानसि सर्वसमम्।।१७।।
verses.translation: Here everything equally is life. Certainly here everything is life which is undifferentiated. Here there is only life which is pure. Why do you cry O mind? You are the same in everything.

verses.sanskrit: अविवेकविवेकमबोध इति अविकल्पविकल्पमबोध इति। यदि चैकनिरन्तरबोध इति किमु रोदिषि मानसि सर्वसमम्।।१८।।
verses.translation: It is known as both discrimination and indiscrimination. It is known as both ignorance and knowledge. If there is this undifferentiated knowledge, why do you cry O mind? You are the same in everything.

verses.sanskrit: न हि मोक्षपदं न हि बन्धपदं न हि पुण्यपदं न हि पापपदम्। न हि पूर्णपदं न हि रिक्तपदं किमु रोदिषि मानसि सर्वसमम्।।१९।।
verses.translation: There is no state of liberation or bondage. There is no state of right conduct or wrong conduct. There is no state of perfection or imperfection. Why do you cry O mind? You are the same in everything.

verses.sanskrit: यदि वर्णविवर्णविहीनसमं यदि कारणकार्यविहीनसमम्। यदि भेदविभेदविहीनसमं किमु रोदिषि मानसि सर्वसमम्।।२०।।
verses.translation: If I am equal, free of caste and casteless-ness, if I am equal, free of causes and effects, if I am equal, free of division and non-division, why do you cry O mind? You are the same in everything.

verses.sanskrit: इह सर्वनिरन्तरसर्वचिते इह केवलनिश्चलसर्वचिते। द्विपदादिविवर्जितसर्वचिते किमु रोदिषि मानसि सर्वसमम्।।२१।।
verses.translation: Here all minds are one unbroken and undivided. Here all minds are only pure. Here there are no men, everything is mind. Why do you cry O mind? You are the same in everything.

verses.sanskrit: अतिसर्वनिरन्तरसर्वगतं अतिनिर्मलनिश्चलसर्वगतम्। दिनरात्रिविवर्जितसर्वगतं किमु रोदिषि मानसि सर्वसमम्।।२२।।
verses.translation: It is above all, undifferentiated, omnipresent. It is purest and innocent omnipresence. It is free from day or night. Why do you cry O mind? You are the same in everything.

verses.sanskrit: न हि बन्धविबन्धसमागमनं न हि योगवियोगसमागमनम्। न हि तर्कवितर्कसमागमनं किमु रोदिषि मानसि सर्वसमम्।।२३।।
verses.translation: It is not a meeting of freedom and bondage. It is not a meeting of union and separation. It is not a meeting of logic and arguments. Why do you cry O mind? You are the same in everything.

verses.sanskrit: इह कालविकालनिराकरणं अणुमात्रकृशानुनिराकरणम्। न हि केवलसत्यनिराकरणं किमु रोदिषि मानसि सर्वसमम्।।२४।।
verses.translation: Here time and timelessness do not exist. Here atoms and molecules do not exist. Here only the ultimate truth exists. Why do you cry O mind? You are the same in everything.

verses.sanskrit: इह देहविदेहविहीन इति ननु स्वप्नसुषुप्तिविहीनपरम्। अभिधानविधानविहीनपरं किमु रोदिषि मानसि सर्वसमम्।।२५।।
verses.translation: Here there is no body or disembodiment. Nor is there dreaming or deep sleep. This ultimate has no names and titles. Why do you cry O mind? You are the same in everything.

verses.sanskrit: गगनोपमशुद्धविशालसमं अतिसर्वविवर्जितसर्वसमम्। गतसारविसारविकारसमं किमु रोदिषि मानसि सर्वसमम्।।२६।।
verses.translation: Just like the metaphorical space, it is omnipresent, pure and immense. It has presence and absence of everything. It has everything essential and nonessential. Why do you cry O mind? You are the same in everything.

verses.sanskrit: इह धर्मविधर्मविरागतर मिह वस्तुविवस्तुविरागतरम्। इह कामविकामविरागतरं किमु रोदिषि मानसि सर्वसमम्।।२७।।
verses.translation: Here there is detachment from right conduct and wrong conduct. Here there is a detachment from objects and non-objects. Here there is detachment from desire and desireless-ness. Why do you cry O mind? You are the same in everything.

verses.sanskrit: सुखदुःखविवर्जितसर्वसम मिह शोकविशोकविहीनपरम्। गुरुशिष्यविवर्जिततत्त्वपरं किमु रोदिषि मानसि सर्वसमम्।।२८।।
verses.translation: It is everything equally, free from happiness and suffering. It is the ultimate, free from pleasures and pains. It is the ultimate, has no Guru and student. Why do you cry O mind? You are the same in everything.

verses.sanskrit: न किलाङ्कुरसारविसार इति न चलाचलसाम्यविसाम्यमिति। अविचारविचारविहीनमिति किमु रोदिषि मानसि सर्वसमम्।।२९।।
verses.translation: It is certainly not a seed. It is not essence and details. It is not living and dead. It is not similar or dissimilar. It is not introspection or absence of thought. Why do you cry O mind? You are the same in everything.

verses.sanskrit: इह सारसमुच्चयसारमिति कथितं निजभावविभेद इति। विषये करणत्वमसत्यमिति किमु रोदिषि मानसि सर्वसमम्।।३०।।
verses.translation: It is known as the essence of all essences. How can you find differences in one's own existence? It is not true that you are the perceiver of objects. Why do you cry O mind? You are the same in everything.

verses.sanskrit: बहुधा श्रुतयः प्रवदन्ति यतो वियदादिरिदं मृगतोयसमम्। यदि चैकनिरन्तरसर्वसमं किमु रोदिषि मानसि सर्वसमम्।।३१।।
verses.translation: As the scriptures say - the existence is like a mirage. If it is the same everywhere and eternal, why do you cry O mind? You are the same in everything.

verses.sanskrit: विन्दति विन्दति न हि न हि यत्र छन्दोलक्षणं न हि न हि तत्र। समरसमग्नो भावितपूतः प्रलपति तत्त्वं परमवधूतः।।३२।।
verses.translation: Where there is no knowledge, verses do not go there. I am involved in the world and I am renounced. I have spoken the ultimate truth.
